project_metadata.description: A modern, conversion-focused agency landing site in dark glassmorphism—showcases services, testimonials, portfolio, pricing, and contact with orange/coral gradients.
project_metadata.core_purpose: Convert visitors into agency leads via high-impact landing experience.
project_metadata.target_audience: B2B, SMEs, startups seeking digital marketing

pages.purpose: High-converting digital marketing agency landing page
pages.description: A single, long-scroll landing page using stacked glassmorphism and modern web sections. Each area is separated by Y-20 or more, with deep navy backgrounds, indigo/gray/black gradients between. All content (header, hero, stats, services, features, process, testimonials, portfolio, pricing, blog preview, CTA, footer) flows vertically, center-aligned, max 1440px. Cards and major features emerge with fade/slide. All elements scale and shift for mobile-first. Section IDs for in-page anchor navigation. Top nav sticky, footer persistent. All action buttons high contrast. Card design: deep glass, orange glow, hover interactions. Typography: Inter, bold headlines, balanced whitespace, orange/white gradient accents. Images: tech/agency/digital illustrations. No backend—data defined frontside. Only ONE route: '/' (no multi-page nav).
pages.content_notes: All visual sections merged in a single home/landing page, scroll-triggered framer motion transitions, in-page anchor routing. No actual blog, contact, or case-study detail views.

theme.interaction_style: hover glows, buttons pulse, card scale-up

components.description: Sticky top header using flexbox, z-50; left: SVG logo (40px x 40px), right: horizontal nav links (Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, each semi-bold, uppercase); trailing: rounded-2xl orange gradient CTA button with shadow/hover glow. Padding x-8 y-4. Background: dark navy (#12142A) 96% opaque. Fine 1px lower border, white 8% opacity.

2-column flex, align-center, min-h-[60vh], left: bold Inter 6xl headline (white), med-lg subheadline (gray 400), action row: two pill-shaped buttons (primary orange-coral gradient with shadow/hover pulse, secondary white with orange border); below, trusted-by brand logos (if any, row); right: hero SVG/PNG, subject is digital marketing, color-accent shadows. Padding: x-12 y-20. Z:10.

Grid (3 columns, gap-6), glassmorphism panel; each stat: bold 4xl white number, label underneath (gray 300, med weight), faded orange icon above. Panel: bg-[#171A32]/90 backdrop-blur-2xl, 20px radius, shadow-lg; Card hover: slight scale-up, glow border. Padding: x-8 y-8, responsive stack. Z:15.

Responsive grid (2-3 columns), each service in glass card: top-center colored icon (56px, orange gradient), bold title (white), short description (gray-300, med font), card: rounded-2xl, deep drop shadow, hover: card glows, icon bounces. Spacing: grid-gap-8, y-16. Padding: x-8 y-8.

Single-row flex, or wrap-3, each card: circle glassmorph icon (44px, orange), bold title (white), small description (gray 400); panel: bg-[#151728]/95, rounded-xl, subtle inner shadow. Padding: x-6 y-8. Z:12.

Horizontal scrollable (mobile) or step grid (desktop, 4-5 steps), each step: circular orange icon, bold step label, micro-desc. Numbers in pill at top-left. Steps linked by animated line. Card hover: lift effect. Padding: x-6 y-10.

Glass blurred carousel, max 3-4 slides visible; each: rounded-xl card, star rating row (5 orange stars), quote (white, italic), client round photo+name+company (small, gray 400). Navigation arrows with framer motion fade. Padding: x-8 y-8.

3-col grid (responsive 1/2/3), case cards: glass panel with shadow, thumb image (aspect 4:3, dark overlay gradient), bold project name (white), type/small desc (gray 300). Cards hover: image lightens, text shifts up. Padding: x-6 y-10.

3 column flexbox; each glassified card: bold Inter 2xl plan title, price in 5xl orange, features (list, checkmark icons, white text); trailing: wide orange-gradient CTA button. Card hover: shadow pulse. Padding: x-4 y-8.

Grid (2-3 col), each post: glass card, top: 16:9 image w/ gradient overlay; title (white, semibold), date (orange small), 2-line summary (gray 300), Read More chevron btn. Card hover: image rises, title color shift. Padding: x-6 y-6.

Full-width bg: orange-coral gradient (to right), center: bold white Inter 3xl text, under: concise subtext, single large white-outline pill CTA (on hover: solid fill, slight scale-up shadow). Corner icons faded low-opacity. Padding: y-12.

Footer glass panel, left: SVG logo+agency tagline; right: 2 nav columns (links), rightmost: social icon row (colored in orange/white), below: address/email/phone (small gray 400), bottom bar (copyright × year). Area: dark navy, subtle top glow. Padding: x-8 y-10.

frontend.styling: Tailwind v4 with custom glass/gradient styles
